segments.text: TOW NINE ZERO FOUR, on gate forty one with a MAX, like to reposition over to gate eight zero.
JAZZ FOUR FOUR FIVE, ready to taxi gate thirty four.
JAZZ FOUR FOUR FIVE, ground runway zero eight right altimeter three zero zero zero, taxi via Lima, hold short runway one three.
Lima, hold short one three, JAZZ FOUR FOUR FIVE.
JAZZ EIGHT ZERO THREE, with you ILS TWO SIX RIGHT.
JAZZ EIGHT ZERO THREE, Vancouver tower number two, following the EMBRAER, two mile final wind two eight zero at thirteen, cleared to land runway two six right.
cleared to land two six right, number two, JAZZ EIGHT ZERO THREE.
PASCO ONE SIX ONE TWO, cross runway two six left, taxi Hotel Alfa Charlie to the apron.
good morning, AIR CANADA FIVE NINETY's at gate seventy four <requesting>.
AIR CANADA FIVE NINETY, Vancouver tower good morning, pushback at your discretion.
push at discretion, AIR CANADA FIVE NINETY.
JAZZ THREE TWO, sorry at the end are you going southbound onto Alfa five or northbound onto Delta five.
